---
title: "Reference: S3 methods"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Reference: S3 methods}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 4.5
)
set.seed(1)
FAST <- TRUE
mcmc <- if (FAST) {
  list(niter = 300, nburnin = 80, thin = 2, nchains = 1, seed = 1)
} else {
  list(niter = 5000, nburnin = 1500, thin = 5, nchains = 2, seed = c(1, 2))
}
```

## Goal

This vignette is a quick reference for common S3 methods on a `mixgpd_fit` object.

## Fit a small model

```{r}
library(DPmixGPD)

y <- abs(rnorm(50)) + 0.1
bundle <- build_nimble_bundle(
  y = y,
  backend = "sb",
  kernel = "normal",
  GPD = TRUE,
  components = 6,
  mcmc = mcmc
)
fit <- run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle, show_progress = FALSE)
```

## `print()`

```{r}
print(fit)
```

## `summary()`

```{r}
summary(fit)
```

## `plot()`

```{r}
try(plot(fit, family = "trace"), silent = TRUE)
```

## `predict()`

```{r}
# Mean / median
predict(fit, type = "mean", cred.level = 0.90, interval = "credible")$fit
predict(fit, type = "median", cred.level = 0.90, interval = "credible")$fit

# Quantile
predict(fit, type = "quantile", index = 0.90, cred.level = 0.90, interval = "credible")$fit
```

## `fitted()`

```{r}
# Returns a data.frame with fit, interval, residuals
f <- fitted(fit, type = "mean", level = 0.90)
head(f)
```

## Object structure

```{r}
str(fit, max.level = 2)
```

```{r sessioninfo, include=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
